transcription.text: We're going to drive home a point about new anti-leak Xe-Rex antifreeze. It stops most common radiator leaks just like that. We guarantee it will stop and prevent leaks in your car radiator for a full year. Or just write DuPont and get your money back. Only Xe-Rex antifreeze is guaranteed not to run out on you.
